name: High Sensation-Seeking
description: Drawn to intense, novel, or edgy experiences and tends to downplay potential risks.

name: Impulsive / Low Self-Control
description: Acts quickly on urges or emotions without thinking ahead about consequences.

name: Anxious / Approval-Seeking
description: Worries about rejection or getting in trouble and strongly seeks reassurance and approval.

name: Compliant / Rule-Focused
description: Generally follows rules, wants to do the right thing, and may trust authority too easily.
